    have hxN : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hxB
    have haN : a ≤ N := le_trans ha hxN
    have hsub : (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x} ⊆ sSup D := by
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      obtain ⟨⟨M, hM, hyB⟩, _⟩ := hy
      have hyM : y ≤ M := by rw [hB M hM]; exact le_sSup hyB
      exact le_trans hyM (le_sSup hM)
    have hBxsub : B N hN \ {x} ⊆ (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x} := by
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy ⊢
      exact ⟨⟨N, hN, hy.1⟩, hy.2⟩
    have ha'B : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      apply le_trans ha'
      apply sSup_le
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      obtain ⟨⟨M, hM, hyB⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
      by_cases hMN : M = N
      · apply le_sup_of_le_left; apply le_sSup; exact ⟨hMN ▸ hyB, hyx⟩
      · apply le_sup_of_le_right; apply le_sSup; exact ⟨hM, hMN⟩
    have hdisj : Disjoint N (sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) := 
      D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN Set.diff_subset (Set.not_mem_diff_of_mem rfl)
    have hdisj' : Disjoint x (sSup (B N hN \ {x})) := 
      (hB' N hN).disjoint_sSup hxB Set.diff_subset (Set.not_mem_diff_of_mem rfl)
    have h1 : a ≤ x ⊓ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      apply le_trans (le_inf ha ha'B)
      simp only [inf_sup_left]
      exact sup_le_sup_right inf_le_right _
    have h2 : a ≤ ⊥ ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := le_trans h1 (sup_le_sup_right (disjoint_iff.mp hdisj') _)
    simp only [bot_sup_eq] at h2
    exact disjoint_iff.mp hdisj (le_inf haN h2)

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩ := hx
    exact (hB' N hN).disjoint_sSup hxB Set.diff_subset (Set.not_mem_diff_of_mem rfl) 
      ⟨ha, le_trans ha' (sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset_diff (Set.subset_iUnion₂ N hN) (Set.Subset.refl _)))⟩

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩ := hx
    -- x is in B N hN, and we need to use sSupIndep properties
    have hxN : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hxB
    have haN : a ≤ N := le_trans ha hxN
    -- Split the complement into parts inside B N hN and outside
    have hsub : (⋃ N', ⋃ hN', B N' hN') \ {x} ⊆ 
                (B N hN \ {x}) ∪ (⋃ N', ⋃ hN', B N' hN' \ B N hN) := by
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_iUnion] at hy ⊢
      obtain ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
      by_cases h : y ∈ B N hN
      · left; exact ⟨h, hyx⟩
      · right; exact ⟨N', hN', hyB, h⟩
    have ha'' : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN \ {x}) ∪ (⋃ N', ⋃ hN', B N' hN' \ B N hN)) := 
      le_trans ha' (sSup_le_sSup hsub)
    rw [sSup_union] at ha''
    have hpart1 : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (⋃ N', ⋃ hN', B N' hN' \ B N hN) := ha''
    have hother_le : sSup (⋃ N', ⋃ hN', B N' hN' \ B N hN) ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      apply sSup_le
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff] at hy
      obtain ⟨N', hN', hyB, hynotB⟩ := hy
      have hyN' : y ≤ N' := by rw [hB N' hN']; exact le_sSup hyB
      have hN'neN : N' ≠ N := by
        intro heq; subst heq; exact hynotB hyB
      apply le_trans hyN'
      exact le_sSup (by simp [hN', hN'neN] : N' ∈ D.carrier \ {N})
    have hdisj_N : Disjoint N (sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) := D.sSupIndep hN
    have ha_disj : a ≤ N ⊓ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      apply le_inf haN
      calc a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (⋃ N', ⋃ hN', B N' hN' \ B N hN) := hpart1
           _ ≤ N ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
               apply sup_le_sup
               · rw [hB N hN]; exact sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset)
               · exact hother_le
           _ = sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
               rw [sup_comm, sup_eq_left]
               exact le_sSup_of_le hN le_rfl
    rw [disjoint_iff_inf_le] at hdisj_N
    exact le_trans ha_disj hdisj_N

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩ := hx
    have hBN_indep := hB' N hN
    have hD_indep := D.sSupIndep
    have hN_eq : N = sSup (B N hN) := hB N hN
    -- a ≤ x and x ∈ B N hN, so a ≤ N
    have ha_le_N : a ≤ N := ha.trans (hN_eq ▸ le_sSup hxB)
    -- The complement splits into: (B N hN \ {x}) and things from other N' ≠ N
    have hsub : (⋃ M, ⋃ (hM : M ∈ D), B M hM) \ {x} ⊆ (B N hN \ {x}) ∪ ⋃ (M : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hM : M ∈ D) (_ : M ≠ N), B M hM := by
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_union] at hy ⊢
      obtain ⟨⟨M, hM, hyM⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
      by_cases hMN : M = N
      · left; exact ⟨hMN ▸ hyM, hyx⟩
      · right; exact ⟨M, hM, hMN, hyM⟩
    have hother_le : sSup (⋃ (M : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hM : M ∈ D) (_ : M ≠ N), B M hM) ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      apply sSup_le; intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hy
      obtain ⟨M, hM, hMN, hyM⟩ := hy
      exact le_sSup_of_le ⟨hM, hMN⟩ ((hB M hM) ▸ le_sSup hyM)
    have ha'_bound : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      calc a ≤ sSup ((⋃ M, ⋃ (hM : M ∈ D), B M hM) \ {x}) := ha'
        _ ≤ sSup ((B N hN \ {x}) ∪ ⋃ (M : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hM : M ∈ D) (_ : M ≠ N), B M hM) := sSup_le_sSup hsub
        _ ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (⋃ (M : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hM : M ∈ D) (_ : M ≠ N), B M hM) := sSup_union_le_sSup_sup_sSup
        _ ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := sup_le_sup_left hother_le _
    have hdisjN : Disjoint N (sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) := hD_indep hN
    have hdisjx : Disjoint x (sSup (B N hN \ {x})) := hBN_indep hxB
    have hBN_sub_N : sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ N := by rw [hN_eq]; exact sSup_le_sSup Set.diff_subset
    calc a ≤ a ⊓ x := by rw [inf_eq_left]; exact ha
      _ ≤ (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) ⊓ x := inf_le_inf_right x ha'_bound
      _ = (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊓ x) ⊔ (sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) ⊓ x) := inf_sup_right _ _ _
      _ ≤ (x ⊓ sSup (B N hN \ {x})) ⊔ (N ⊓ sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) := by
          apply sup_le_sup
          · exact inf_comm _ _ ▸ le_rfl
          · exact inf_le_inf_right _ (hN_eq ▸ le_sSup hxB)
      _ ≤ ⊥ ⊔ ⊥ := sup_le_sup hdisjx.le_bot (by rw [inf_comm]; exact hdisjN.le_bot)
      _ = ⊥ := sup_idem _

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩ := hx
    have hle : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      apply sSup_le
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_iUnion] at hy
      obtain ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
      by_cases hNN' : N = N'
      · subst hNN'
        exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
      · apply le_sup_of_le_left
        apply le_sSup
        constructor
        · exact hN'
        · exact hNN'
    have h1 : a ≤ N := le_trans ha (by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hxB)
    have h2 : a ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := le_trans ha' hle
    have hDisjD : Disjoint N (sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) := D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN Set.diff_subset (Set.not_mem_diff_of_mem rfl)
    have h3 : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have : a ≤ N ⊓ (sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x})) := le_inf h1 h2
      rwa [inf_sup_self_of_disjoint hDisjD] at this
    exact (hB' N hN).disjoint_sSup hxB Set.diff_subset (Set.not_mem_diff_of_mem rfl) (le_inf ha h3)

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩ := hx
    -- x ∈ B N hN, and a ≤ x, a ≤ sSup of everything except x
    -- We need to show a ≤ ⊥
    -- First, a ≤ x ≤ N since x ∈ B N hN and N = sSup (B N hN)
    have hxN : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hxB
    have haN : a ≤ N := le_trans ha hxN
    -- Now we split the sSup into parts inside B N hN and outside
    have hsub : (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x} = 
                (B N hN \ {x}) ∪ (⋃ N', ⋃ (hN' : N' ∈ D), if N' = N then ∅ else B N' hN') := by
      ext y
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_union, 
                 Set.mem_empty_iff_false]
      constructor
      · rintro ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩
        by_cases hNN' : N' = N
        · left; subst hNN'; exact ⟨hyB, hyx⟩
        · right; exact ⟨N', hN', by simp [hNN', hyB]⟩
      · rintro (⟨hyB, hyx⟩ | ⟨N', hN', hyB⟩)
        · exact ⟨⟨N, hN, hyB⟩, hyx⟩
        · simp only at hyB
          split_ifs at hyB with hNN'
          · exact hyB.elim
          · exact ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, fun hyx => by subst hyx; exact hNN' (hB N hN ▸ hB N' hN' ▸ 
              le_antisymm (le_sSup hxB ▸ le_sSup hyB) (le_sSup hyB ▸ le_sSup hxB)).symm⟩
    -- This is getting complex. Let's use a more direct approach.
    -- a ≤ x and a ≤ sSup of complement. By sSupIndep of B N hN, we get a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊓ x = ⊥
    -- But we also need to handle elements outside B N hN
    have ha'_split : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (⋃ N' ∈ D, if N' = N then ∅ else B N' hN') := by
      apply le_trans ha'
      apply sSup_le_sSup
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      obtain ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
      by_cases hNN' : N' = N
      · subst hNN'; left; exact ⟨hyB, hyx⟩
      · right; simp only [Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨N', hN', by simp [hNN', hyB]⟩
    have hother_le : sSup (⋃ N' ∈ D, if N' = N then ∅ else B N' hN') ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      apply sSup_le
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hy
      obtain ⟨N', hN', hyB⟩ := hy
      simp only at hyB
      split_ifs at hyB with hNN'
      · exact hyB.elim
      · have : y ≤ N' := by rw [hB N' hN']; exact le_sSup hyB
        exact le_trans this (le_sSup (by simp [hN', hNN']))
    have haN' : a ≤ N ⊓ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      apply le_inf haN
      apply le_trans ha'
      apply sSup_le
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      obtain ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
      have hyN' : y ≤ N' := by rw [hB N' hN']; exact le_sSup hyB
      by_cases hNN' : N' = N
      · subst hNN'
        have : y ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩
        exact le_trans this (sSup_le (fun z hz => le_trans (le_sSup hz.1) (by rw [← hB N hN])))
      · exact le_trans hyN' (le_sSup (by simp [hN', hNN']))
    have hDisjD : Disjoint N (sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) := D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN (by simp) (by simp)
    exact le_trans haN' (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hDisjD)

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩ := hx
    have hxN : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hxB
    have haN : a ≤ N := le_trans ha hxN
    have ha'_split : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (⋃ N', ⋃ hN' : N' ∈ D, if N' = N then ∅ else B N' hN') := by
      apply le_trans ha'
      apply sSup_le_sSup
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_iUnion] at hy ⊢
      obtain ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
      by_cases hNN' : N' = N
      · left; subst hNN'; exact ⟨hyB, hyx⟩
      · right; exact ⟨N', hN', by simp [hNN', hyB]⟩
    have hsup_other_le : sSup (⋃ N', ⋃ hN' : N' ∈ D, if N' = N then ∅ else B N' hN') ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      apply sSup_le
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hy
      obtain ⟨N', hN', hy'⟩ := hy
      split_ifs at hy' with hNN'
      · exact (Set.not_mem_empty _ hy').elim
      · apply le_sSup_of_le (a := N')
        · exact ⟨hN', hNN'⟩
        · rw [hB N' hN']; exact le_sSup hy'
    have hdisj_N : Disjoint N (sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) := D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN (fun y hy => hy.1) (by simp)
    have ha_in_B : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      have : a ≤ N ⊓ (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) := le_inf haN (le_trans ha'_split (sup_le_sup_left hsup_other_le _))
      rw [inf_sup_right] at this
      have : N ⊓ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) = ⊥ := disjoint_iff.mp hdisj_N
      simp only [this, sup_bot_eq] at this
      exact le_trans this (inf_le_right)
    exact (hB' N hN).disjoint_sSup hxB (fun y hy => hy.1) (by simp) (le_inf ha ha_in_B)
B

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩ := hx
    have ha_le_N : a ≤ N := ha.trans (le_sSup hxB |>.trans (hB N hN).symm.le)
    have hsup_le : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup D.carrier := by
      apply sSup_le_sSup
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      obtain ⟨⟨M', hM', _⟩, _⟩ := hy
      exact hM'
    have hBx_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := hB' N hN x hxB
    have ha_le_sSupBx : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      apply le_trans ha'
      apply sSup_le_sSup
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy ⊢
      obtain ⟨⟨M', hM', hyB⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
      by_cases hMN : M' = N
      · subst hMN; exact ⟨hyB, hyx⟩
      · refine ⟨le_sSup hyB |>.trans (hB M' hM').symm.le |>.trans ?_, hyx⟩
        exact le_sSup_of_le (by simp [hN, hMN] : M' ∈ D.carrier \ {N}) le_rfl |>.trans 
          (D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN (fun y hy => hy.1) (fun h => h.2 rfl)).symm.le_bot.trans bot_le |>.antisymm bot_le ▸ bot_le
    exact disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hBx_disj ⟨ha, ha_le_sSupBx⟩

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩ := hx
    have hxN : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hxB
    have haN : a ≤ N := le_trans ha hxN
    have hsub : (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x} ⊆ 
                (B N hN \ {x}) ∪ (⋃ N', ⋃ (hN' : N' ∈ D), if N' = N then ∅ else B N' hN') := by
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_iUnion] at hy
      obtain ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyne⟩ := hy
      by_cases hNN' : N' = N
      · left; exact ⟨hNN' ▸ hyB, hyne⟩
      · right; simp only [Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨N', hN', by simp [hNN', hyB]⟩
    have ha'_in_B : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (↑D \ {N}) := by
      apply le_trans ha'
      apply le_trans (sSup_le_sSup hsub)
      rw [sSup_union]
      apply sup_le_sup (le_refl _)
      apply sSup_le
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hy
      obtain ⟨N', hN', hy'⟩ := hy
      split_ifs at hy' with h
      · exact (Set.not_mem_empty y hy').elim
      · have : y ≤ N' := by rw [hB N' hN']; exact le_sSup hy'
        exact le_trans this (le_sSup_of_le (by simp [hN', h]) (le_refl _))
    have hdisj1 : Disjoint x (sSup (B N hN \ {x})) := hB' N hN hxB
    have hdisj2 : Disjoint N (sSup (↑D \ {N})) := D.sSupIndep hN
    have ha_le_x_inf : a ≤ x ⊓ (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (↑D \ {N})) := le_inf ha ha'_in_B
    have hN_disj : Disjoint N (sSup (↑D \ {N})) := D.sSupIndep hN
    have hx_disj_sup : Disjoint x (sSup (↑D \ {N})) := by
      apply Disjoint.mono_left hxN hN_disj
    have : a ≤ x ⊓ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ x ⊓ sSup (↑D \ {N}) := by
      calc a ≤ x ⊓ (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (↑D \ {N})) := ha_le_x_inf
           _ ≤ x ⊓ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ x ⊓ sSup (↑D \ {N}) := inf_sup_le _ _ _
    rw [disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hdisj1, disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hx_disj_sup, bot_sup_eq] at this
    exact this

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩ := hx
    have hxN : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hxB
    have haN : a ≤ N := le_trans ha hxN
    have ha'_split : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (⋃ N', ⋃ hN' : N' ∈ D, (if N' = N then ∅ else B N' hN')) := by
      apply le_trans ha'
      apply sSup_le_sSup
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Set.mem_iUnion] at hy ⊢
      obtain ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
      by_cases hNN' : N' = N
      · left; subst hNN'; exact ⟨hyB, hyx⟩
      · right; exact ⟨N', hN', by simp [hNN', hyB]⟩
    have hDisjOther : Disjoint N (sSup (⋃ N', ⋃ hN' : N' ∈ D, (if N' = N then ∅ else B N' hN'))) := by
      apply Disjoint.mono_right _ (D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN (fun N' hN' => hN') (by simp))
      apply sSup_le_sSup
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hy ⊢
      obtain ⟨N', hN', hy'⟩ := hy
      split_ifs at hy' with h
      · exact hy'.elim
      · refine ⟨N', hN', ?_⟩
        rw [hB N' hN']
        exact le_sSup hy'
    have ha_in_N : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      have := hDisjOther.mono_left haN
      rw [disjoint_iff] at this
      calc a ≤ a ⊓ (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (⋃ N', ⋃ hN' : N' ∈ D, (if N' = N then ∅ else B N' hN'))) := le_inf le_rfl ha'_split
        _ ≤ a ⊓ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) ⊔ a ⊓ sSup (⋃ N', ⋃ hN' : N' ∈ D, (if N' = N then ∅ else B N' hN')) := inf_sup_le _ _ _
        _ ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) ⊔ (N ⊓ sSup (⋃ N', ⋃ hN' : N' ∈ D, (if N' = N then ∅ else B N' hN'))) := by
            apply sup_le_sup inf_le_right (inf_le_inf_right _ haN)

      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      obtain ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
      by_cases hNN' : N' = N
      · subst hNN'; exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
      · apply le_sup_of_le_right
        apply le_trans (le_sSup hyB)
        rw [← hB N' hN']
        exact le_sSup hN'
    have hdisj : Disjoint N (sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) := D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN (fun y hy => hy) (by simp)
    have ha_left : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have : a ≤ N ⊓ (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) := le_inf haN ha'_inside
      rw [inf_sup_assoc_of_le (by rw [hB N hN]; exact sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset))] at this
      have : sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) ⊓ N = ⊥ := by rw [inf_comm]; exact disjoint_iff.mp hdisj
      simp only [this, sup_bot_eq] at this
      exact this
    exact (hB' N hN).disjoint_sSup hxB (Set.diff_subset) (Set.not_mem_diff_of_mem rfl) ⟨ha, ha_left⟩

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩ := hx
    have hsub : B N hN \ {x} ⊆ (⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) \ {x} := fun y hy =>
      ⟨Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hy.1⟩⟩, hy.2⟩
    have h1 : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := le_trans ha' (sSup_le_sSup hsub)
    exact (hB' N hN).disjoint_sSup hxB Set.diff_subset (Set.not_mem_diff_of_mem rfl) ha h1
